title: Let Children Hear the Mighty Deeds

verses.text: Let children hear the mighty deeds which God performed of old, Which in our younger years We saw and which our fathers told. He bids us make his glories known, The works of power and grace, That we convey his wonders down Through every rising race. Psalter Hymnal, 1959

Our lips shall tell them to our sons, And they again to theirs, And generations yet unborn Must teach them to their heirs. Thus shall they learn, in God alone Their hope securely stands, That they may ne’er forget this works, But practice his commands. Psalter Hymnal, 1959
